title: Cache Identity, TTL, Clock Injection, Readonly Copies, and Capacity · Type-System Trace: Pokedex Ts Cache Eviction Metrics
summary: The cache keys raw input, reads Date.now internally, shares mutable objects, conflates stale with absent, stores aborted promises, and has no entry or byte ceiling. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source.
